g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is unset appendwrite needed before the loop starts?')
g.text: Clear output file · single shared X-axis · write CSV column headers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does alterparam do in ngspice?')
g.text: Dynamically updates transistor width W in the netlist before each run

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is reset needed before each DC simulation?')
g.text: Set V_DS and clear prior simulation state
Save all node voltages and branch currents

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the nested DC sweep over I0 and V2')
g.text: Nested DC sweep: outer over I_bias, inner over gate voltage V_G

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is Ron_Gm_unit and why is it useful?')
g.text: R_on = V_DS / I_DS · g_m of bias and Ron devices
R_on·G_m = R_on / g_m_bias · G_m/I_D · V_swing = V_G − V_bias

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is appendwrite toggled only after the first iteration?')
g.text: 1st iteration → fresh file with column headers
All others → set appendwrite and append row

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How many total simulation points does this sweep produce?')
